title: cyclosorus × gorkhalensis
intro: Cyclosorus × gorkhalensis, also known as Gorkha cyclosorus or Gorkha fern, is a hybrid species of fern, derived from the natural hybridization of Cyclosorus caudatus and C. serlus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cyclosorus × gorkhalensis include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, making it a valuable herb in Ayurvedic medicine. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves of Cyclosorus × gorkhalensis are typically dried, powdered, and mixed with other herbs to create tonics and teas for various health purposes.
